{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"call_a494d066f59a41cb9f53f90b","type":"tool_result","content":"1\t# bead-forge Implementation Plan\n2\t\n3\t> **User-facing documentation:** [`../README.md`](../README.md) — overview, command reference, NEEDLE integration guide, and hero image.\n4\t\n5\t## Overview\n6\t\n7\t**bead-forge** (`bf`) is a Rust binary that replaces `br` (beads_rust). SQLite is the live database — all reads and writes go through it. `issues.jsonl` is a git-synced artifact exported on demand: one entry per bead, committed to the repo for backup, sharing, and recovery. Concurrent claiming is handled by SQLite's `BEGIN IMMEDIATE` transaction — no server, no daemon, no flock required.\n8\t\n9\t## Core Principles\n10\t\n11\t1. **SQLite is the live store** — all mutations are SQL writes; reads are SQL queries. Fast, concurrent-read, serialized-write via WAL mode.\n12\t2. **JSONL is the git artifact** — exported on `bf sync`, committed to git, one entry per bead. Used for backup, cross-machine sharing, and recovery. Never written during normal operation.\n13\t3. **Drop-in CLI** — all `br` commands work under `bf` with the same flags and output formats\n14\t4. **`BEGIN IMMEDIATE` for atomic claim** — the read-score-update sequence runs inside a single SQLite write transaction, eliminating the race condition `br` has without requiring flock or a daemon\n15\t\n16\t---\n17\t\n18\t## Phase 1: Core Library — Data Model & JSONL Import/Export\n19\t\n20\t### 1.1 Data Model (`src/model.rs`)\n21\t\n22\tPort the exact `Issue`, `Status`, `Priority`, `IssueType`, `Dependency`, `DependencyType`, `Comment`, and `Event` structs from beads_rust with identical Serde attributes. This is the wire format — every field, every `skip_serializing_if`, every rename must match.\n23\t\n24\tKey structs and their JSONL serialization:\n25\t\n26\t```\n27\tStatus:       open | in_progress | blocked | deferred | draft | closed | tombstone | pinned | Custom(String)\n28\tPriority:     transparent i32 (0=Critical, 4=Backlog)\n29\tIssueType:    task | bug | feature | epic | chore | docs | question | Custom(String)\n30\tDependency:   { issue_id, depends_on_id, type (renamed from dep_type), created_at, created_by?, metadata?, thread_id? }\n31\tComment:      { id: i64, issue_id, author, text (renamed from body), created_at }\n32\tEvent:        { id: i64, issue_id, event_type, actor, old_value?, new_value?, comment?, created_at }\n33\t```\n34\t\n35\tIssue fields (alphabetical by JSON key):\n36\t```\n37\tid, title, description?, design?, acceptance_criteria?, notes?,\n38\tstatus, priority, issue_type, assignee?, owner?, estimated_minutes?,\n39\tcreated_at, created_by?, updated_at, closed_at?, close_reason?,\n40\tclosed_by_session?, due_at?, defer_until?, external_ref?,\n41\tsource_system?, source_repo, deleted_at?, deleted_by?, delete_reason?,\n42\toriginal_type?, compaction_level (default 0), compacted_at?,\n43\tcompacted_at_commit?, original_size?, sender?, ephemeral (default false),\n44\tpinned (default false), is_template (default false),\n45\tlabels: Vec<String>, dependencies: Vec<Dependency>, comments: Vec<Comment>\n46\t```\n47\t\n48\t### 1.2 JSONL Import (`src/jsonl.rs`)\n49\t\n50\tJSONL is read only during `bf sync --import` (pulling state from git) and `bf doctor --repair` (rebuilding SQLite from the artifact). Never read during normal CLI operation.\n51\t\n52\t```rust\n53\tfn import_jsonl(jsonl_path: &Path, storage: &Storage) -> Result<ImportResult> {\n54\t    let file = File::open(jsonl_path)?;\n55\t    let reader = BufReader::new(file);\n56\t    storage.with_write_transaction(|tx| {\n57\t        for line in reader.lines() {\n58\t            let issue: Issue = serde_json::from_str(&line?)?;\n59\t            tx.upsert_issue(&issue)?;\n60\t        }\n61\t        Ok(())\n62\t    })\n63\t}\n64\t```\n65\t\n66\tFunctions:\n67\t- `import_jsonl(path, storage)` — bulk upsert from JSONL into SQLite\n68\t- `stream_issues(path) -> impl Iterator<Item = Result<Issue>>` — lazy line iterator (used by import and doctor)\n69\t\n70\t### 1.3 JSONL Export (`src/jsonl.rs`)\n71\t\n72\tJSONL is written only during `bf sync --flush` (preparing the git artifact). Exports current bead state from SQLite, one entry per bead, sorted by ID for stable diffs. Atomic temp+rename.\n73\t\n74\t```rust\n75\tfn export_jsonl(jsonl_path: &Path, storage: &Storage) -> Result<ExportResult> {\n76\t    let issues = storage.list_all_issues()?;  // sorted by ID\n77\t    let temp_path = jsonl_path.with_extension(\"jsonl.tmp\");\n78\t    let mut writer = BufWriter::new(File::create_new(&temp_path)?);\n79\t    for issue in &issues {\n80\t        serde_json::to_writer(&mut writer, issue)?;\n81\t        writer.write_all(b\"\\n\")?;\n82\t    }\n83\t    writer.flush()?;\n84\t    drop(writer);\n85\t    fs::rename(&temp_path, jsonl_path)?;\n86\t    Ok(ExportResult { count: issues.len() })\n87\t}\n88\t```\n89\t\n90\tFunctions:\n91\t- `export_jsonl(path, storage)` — dump all beads from SQLite to JSONL (atomic)\n92\t- `export_jsonl_dirty(path, storage)` — export only dirty beads (incremental, faster for large workspaces)\n93\t\n94\t### 1.4 Config (`src/config.rs`)\n95\t\n96\tParse `.beads/config.yaml` with the same fields br uses:\n97\t\n98\t```yaml\n99\tissue_prefixes: [bd, fg]\n100\tdefault_priority: 2"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"40d7e1cb-f691-4ed3-b34e-f1f123dc7c3b","uuid":"0f8c3399-3d33-41de-bab7-66b700b1aac8","timestamp":"2026-05-01T13:54:39.737Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/home/coding/bead-forge/docs/plan/plan.md","content":"# bead-forge Implementation Plan\n\n> **User-facing documentation:** [`../README.md`](../README.md) — overview, command reference, NEEDLE integration guide, and hero image.\n\n## Overview\n\n**bead-forge** (`bf`) is a Rust binary that replaces `br` (beads_rust). SQLite is the live database — all reads and writes go through it. `issues.jsonl` is a git-synced artifact exported on demand: one entry per bead, committed to the repo for backup, sharing, and recovery. Concurrent claiming is handled by SQLite's `BEGIN IMMEDIATE` transaction — no server, no daemon, no flock required.\n\n## Core Principles\n\n1. **SQLite is the live store** — all mutations are SQL writes; reads are SQL queries. Fast, concurrent-read, serialized-write via WAL mode.\n2. **JSONL is the git artifact** — exported on `bf sync`, committed to git, one entry per bead. Used for backup, cross-machine sharing, and recovery. Never written during normal operation.\n3. **Drop-in CLI** — all `br` commands work under `bf` with the same flags and output formats\n4. **`BEGIN IMMEDIATE` for atomic claim** — the read-score-update sequence runs inside a single SQLite write transaction, eliminating the race condition `br` has without requiring flock or a daemon\n\n---\n\n## Phase 1: Core Library — Data Model & JSONL Import/Export\n\n### 1.1 Data Model (`src/model.rs`)\n\nPort the exact `Issue`, `Status`, `Priority`, `IssueType`, `Dependency`, `DependencyType`, `Comment`, and `Event` structs from beads_rust with identical Serde attributes. This is the wire format — every field, every `skip_serializing_if`, every rename must match.\n\nKey structs and their JSONL serialization:\n\n```\nStatus:       open | in_progress | blocked | deferred | draft | closed | tombstone | pinned | Custom(String)\nPriority:     transparent i32 (0=Critical, 4=Backlog)\nIssueType:    task | bug | feature | epic | chore | docs | question | Custom(String)\nDependency:   { issue_id, depends_on_id, type (renamed from dep_type), created_at, created_by?, metadata?, thread_id? }\nComment:      { id: i64, issue_id, author, text (renamed from body), created_at }\nEvent:        { id: i64, issue_id, event_type, actor, old_value?, new_value?, comment?, created_at }\n```\n\nIssue fields (alphabetical by JSON key):\n```\nid, title, description?, design?, acceptance_criteria?, notes?,\nstatus, priority, issue_type, assignee?, owner?, estimated_minutes?,\ncreated_at, created_by?, updated_at, closed_at?, close_reason?,\nclosed_by_session?, due_at?, defer_until?, external_ref?,\nsource_system?, source_repo, deleted_at?, deleted_by?, delete_reason?,\noriginal_type?, compaction_level (default 0), compacted_at?,\ncompacted_at_commit?, original_size?, sender?, ephemeral (default false),\npinned (default false), is_template (default false),\nlabels: Vec<String>, dependencies: Vec<Dependency>, comments: Vec<Comment>\n```\n\n### 1.2 JSONL Import (`src/jsonl.rs`)\n\nJSONL is read only during `bf sync --import` (pulling state from git) and `bf doctor --repair` (rebuilding SQLite from the artifact). Never read during normal CLI operation.\n\n```rust\nfn import_jsonl(jsonl_path: &Path, storage: &Storage) -> Result<ImportResult> {\n    let file = File::open(jsonl_path)?;\n    let reader = BufReader::new(file);\n    storage.with_write_transaction(|tx| {\n        for line in reader.lines() {\n            let issue: Issue = serde_json::from_str(&line?)?;\n            tx.upsert_issue(&issue)?;\n        }\n        Ok(())\n    })\n}\n```\n\nFunctions:\n- `import_jsonl(path, storage)` — bulk upsert from JSONL into SQLite\n- `stream_issues(path) -> impl Iterator<Item = Result<Issue>>` — lazy line iterator (used by import and doctor)\n\n### 1.3 JSONL Export (`src/jsonl.rs`)\n\nJSONL is written only during `bf sync --flush` (preparing the git artifact). Exports current bead state from SQLite, one entry per bead, sorted by ID for stable diffs. Atomic temp+rename.\n\n```rust\nfn export_jsonl(jsonl_path: &Path, storage: &Storage) -> Result<ExportResult> {\n    let issues = storage.list_all_issues()?;  // sorted by ID\n    let temp_path = jsonl_path.with_extension(\"jsonl.tmp\");\n    let mut writer = BufWriter::new(File::create_new(&temp_path)?);\n    for issue in &issues {\n        serde_json::to_writer(&mut writer, issue)?;\n        writer.write_all(b\"\\n\")?;\n    }\n    writer.flush()?;\n    drop(writer);\n    fs::rename(&temp_path, jsonl_path)?;\n    Ok(ExportResult { count: issues.len() })\n}\n```\n\nFunctions:\n- `export_jsonl(path, storage)` — dump all beads from SQLite to JSONL (atomic)\n- `export_jsonl_dirty(path, storage)` — export only dirty beads (incremental, faster for large workspaces)\n\n### 1.4 Config (`src/config.rs`)\n\nParse `.beads/config.yaml` with the same fields br uses:\n\n```yaml\nissue_prefixes: [bd, fg]\ndefault_priority: 2","numLines":100,"startLine":1,"totalLines":1560}}}

{\n577\t    Ok(Cli::try_parse()?)\n578\t}\n579\t\n580\tpub fn run(cli: Cli) -> Result<()> {\n581\t    let workspace = cli.workspace.unwrap_or_else(|| PathBuf::from(\".\"));\n582\t\n583\t    // For init command, we allow the .beads directory to not exist yet\n584\t    match &cli.command {\n585\t        Commands::Init { .. } => {\n586\t            let beads_dir = workspace.join(\".beads\");\n587\t            return match cli.command {\n588\t                Commands::Init { prefix } => cmd_init(&beads_dir, &prefix),\n589\t                _ => unreachable!(),\n590\t            };\n591\t        }\n592\t        _ => {}\n593\t    }\n594\t\n595\t    let beads_dir = find_beads_dir(&workspace)\n596\t        .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!(\"No .beads directory found in {:?}\", workspace))?;\n597\t\n598\t    match cli.command {\n599\t        Commands::Init { prefix } => cmd_init(&beads_dir, &prefix),\n600\t        Commands::Create { title, type_, priority, description, assignee, label } => {\n601\t            cmd_create(&beads_dir, title, type_, priority, description, assignee, label)\n602\t        }\n603\t        Commands::List { status, type_, assignee, priority, limit, format, json } => {\n604\t            let format = if json { \"json\".to_string() } else { format };\n605\t            cmd_list(&beads_dir, status, type_, assignee, priority, limit, &format)\n606\t        }\n607\t        Commands::Show { id, format, json } => {\n608\t            let format = if json { \"json\".to_string() } else { format };\n609\t            cmd_show(&beads_dir, &id, &format)\n610\t        }\n611\t        Commands::Update { id, title, status, priority, assignee } => {\n612\t            cmd_update(&beads_dir, &id, title, status, priority, assignee)\n613\t        }\n614\t        Commands::Close { id, reason } => cmd_close(&beads_dir, &id, &reason),\n615\t        Commands::Reopen { id } => cmd_reopen(&beads_dir, &id),\n616\t        Commands::Delete { id } => cmd_delete(&beads_dir, &id),\n617\t        Commands::Ready { limit, format, json } => {\n618\t            let format = if json { \"json\".to_string() } else { format };\n619\t            cmd_ready(&beads_dir, limit, &format)\n620\t        }\n621\t        Commands::Claim { assignee, model, harness, harness_version, any, fallback, workspace_paths, dry_run, format, json } => {\n622\t            let format = if json { \"json\".to_string() } else { format };\n623\t            cmd_claim(&beads_dir, &assignee, model, harness, harness_version, any, fallback, &workspace_paths, dry_run, &format)\n624\t        }\n625\t        Commands::Sync { flush_only, import_only } => cmd_sync(&beads_dir, flush_only, import_only),\n626\t        Commands::Doctor { repair } => cmd_doctor(&beads_dir, repair),\n627\t        Commands::Count { status } => cmd_count(&beads_dir, status),\n628\t        Commands::Batch { file, json, stdin } => cmd_batch(&beads_dir, file, json, stdin),\n629\t        Commands::Mitosis { id, children, reason, format } => cmd_mitosis(&beads_dir, &id, &children, &reason, &format),\n630\t        Commands::Dep(dep) => cmd_dep(&beads_dir, dep),\n631\t        Commands::Label(label) => cmd_label(&beads_dir, label),\n632\t        Commands::Comments(comments) => cmd_comments(&beads_dir, comments),\n633\t        Commands::Search { query, status, type_, assignee, label, priority_min, priority_max, limit, format } => {\n634\t            cmd_search(&beads_dir, query, status, type_, assignee, label, priority_min, priority_max, limit, &format)\n635\t        }\n636\t        Commands::Stats { by_type, by_priority, by_assignee, by_label, format } => {\n637\t            cmd_stats(&beads_dir, by_type, by_priority, by_assignee, by_label, &format)\n638\t        }\n639\t        Commands::Schema { target, format } => cmd_schema(&target, &format),\n640\t        Commands::Config(config) => cmd_config(&beads_dir, config),\n641\t        Commands::Velocity { model, harness, format } => cmd_velocity(&beads_dir, model, harness, &format),\n642\t        Commands::Labels { id, format } => cmd_labels(&beads_dir, &id, &format),\n643\t        Commands::Annotate(annotate) => cmd_annotate(&beads_dir, annotate),\n644\t        Commands::Log { id, limit, format } => cmd_log(&beads_dir, &id, limit, &format),\n645\t        Commands::CriticalPath { id, max_depth, format } => cmd_critical_path(&beads_dir, &id, max_depth, &format),\n646\t        Commands::Rotate { days, dry_run } => cmd_rotate(&beads_dir, days, dry_run),\n647\t    }\n648\t}\n649\t\n650\tfn cmd_init(beads_dir: &PathBuf, prefix: &str) -> Result<()> {\n651\t    std::fs::create_dir_all(beads_dir)?;\n652\t\n653\t    let config_path = beads_dir.join(\"config.yaml\");\n654\t    if !config_path.exists() {\n655\t        let config = format!(\n656\t            r#\"issue_prefixes: [{}]\n657\tdefault_priority: 2\n658\tdefault_type: task\n659\tclaim_ttl_minutes: 30\n660\t\"#,\n661\t            prefix\n662\t        );\n663\t        std::fs::write(&config_path, config)?;\n664\t    }\n665\t\n666\t    let metadata_path = beads_dir.join(\"metadata.json\");\n667\t    if !metadata_path.exists() {\n668\t        let metadata = r#\"{\"database\": \"beads.db\", \"jsonl_export\": \"issues.jsonl\"}\"#;\n669\t        std::fs::write(&metadata_path, metadata)?;\n670\t    }\n671\t\n672\t    let db_path = beads_dir.join(\"beads.db\");\n673\t    let _storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n674\t\n675\t    let gitignore_path = beads_dir.join(\".gitignore\");\n676\t    if !gitignore_path.exists() {\n677\t        std::fs::write(&gitignore_path, \"beads.db\\nbeads.db-shm\\nbeads.db-wal\\n\")?;\n678\t    }\n679\t\n680\t    println!(\"Initialized bead-forge workspace in {:?}\", beads_dir);\n681\t    Ok(())\n682\t}\n683\t\n684\tfn cmd_create(\n685\t    beads_dir: &PathBuf,\n686\t    title: String,\n687\t    type_: String,\n688\t    priority: i32,\n689\t    description: Option<String>,\n690\t    assignee: Option<String>,\n691\t    labels: Vec<String>,\n692\t) -> Result<()> {\n693\t    let config = load_config(beads_dir)?;\n694\t    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n695\t    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n696\t    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n697\t\n698\t    let count = storage.count_issues()?;\n699\t    let prefix = get_default_prefix(&config);\n700\t    let id = crate::id::generate_id(prefix, count);\n701\t\n702\t    let mut issue = Issue::new(id.clone(), title, \".\".to_string());\n703\t    issue.issue_type = IssueType::from_str(type_.as_str()).map_err(|e| anyhow::anyhow!(e))?;\n704\t    issue.priority = Priority(priority);\n705\t    issue.description = description;\n706\t    issue.assignee = assignee;\n707\t    issue.labels = labels;\n708\t\n709\t    storage.create_issue(&issue)?;\n710\t\n711\t    println!(\"{}\", id);\n712\t    Ok(())\n713\t}\n714\t\n715\tfn cmd_list(\n716\t    beads_dir: &PathBuf,\n717\t    status: Option<String>,\n718\t    type_: Option<String>,\n719\t    assignee: Option<String>,\n720\t    priority: Option<i32>,\n721\t    limit: Option<usize>,\n722\t    format: &str,\n723\t) -> Result<()> {\n724\t    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n725\t    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n726\t    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n727\t\n728\t    let mut filter = IssueFilter::default();\n729\t    if let Some(s) = status {\n730\t        filter.status = Some(Status::from_str(s.as_str()).map_err(|e| anyhow::anyhow!(e))?);\n731\t    }\n732\t    if let Some(t) = type_ {\n733\t        filter.issue_type = Some(IssueType::from_str(t.as_str()).map_err(|e| anyhow::anyhow!(e))?);\n734\t    }\n735\t    filter.assignee = assignee;\n736\t    filter.priority = priority;\n737\t    // --limit 0 means unlimited\n738\t    filter.limit = limit.and_then(|l| if l == 0 { None } else { Some(l) });\n739\t\n740\t    let issues = storage.list_issues(&filter)?;\n741\t\n742\t    let output_format = OutputFormat::from_str(format).unwrap_or(OutputFormat::Text);\n743\t    let formatter = get_formatter(output_format);\n744\t    print!(\"{}\", formatter.format_issues(&issues));\n745\t\n746\t    Ok(())\n747\t}\n748\t\n749\tfn cmd_show(beads_dir: &PathBuf, id: &str, format: &str) -> Result<()> {\n750\t    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n751\t    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n752\t    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n753\t\n754\t    let issue = storage.get_issue(id)?.ok_or_else(|| anyhow!(\"Bead not found: {}\", id))?;\n755\t\n756\t    match format {\n757\t        \"json\" => {\n758\t            // Strip dependencies/comments before serializing: NEEDLE's BrDependency\n759\t            // format ({id, title, status, priority, dependency_type}) differs from\n760\t            // bead-forge's Dependency format ({issue_id, depends_on_id, type, ...}).\n761\t            // NEEDLE has #[serde(default)] on the deps field so empty is fine.\n762\t            let mut out = issue;\n763\t            out.dependencies = vec![];\n764\t            out.comments = vec![];\n765\t            // Wrap in array so NEEDLE's parse_single_bead (Vec<Bead> → first) works.\n766\t            println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string(&vec![out])?);\n767\t        }\n768\t        \"toon\" => {\n769\t            println!(\"ID: {}\", issue.id);\n770\t            println!(\"Title: {}\", issue.title);\n771\t            println!(\"Status: {}\", issue.status);\n772\t            println!(\"Priority: {}\", issue.priority);\n773\t            println!(\"Type: {}\", issue.issue_type);\n774\t            if let Some(desc) = &issue.description {\n775\t                println!(\"Description: {}\", desc);\n776\t            }\n777\t            if let Some(assignee) = &issue.assignee {\n778\t                println!(\"Assignee: {}\", assignee);\n779\t            }\n780\t            if !issue.labels.is_empty() {\n781\t                println!(\"Labels: {}\", issue.labels.join(\", \"));\n782\t            }\n783\t        }\n784\t        _ => {\n785\t            println!(\"ID: {}\", issue.id);\n786\t            println!(\"Title: {}\", issue.title);\n787\t            println!(\"Status: {}\", issue.status);\n788\t            println!(\"Priority: {}\", issue.priority);\n789\t            println!(\"Type: {}\", issue.issue_type);\n790\t            if let Some(desc) = &issue.description {\n791\t                println!(\"Description: {}\", desc);\n792\t            }\n793\t            if let Some(assignee) = &issue.assignee {\n794\t                println!(\"Assignee: {}\", assignee);\n795\t            }\n796\t            if !issue.labels.is_empty() {\n797\t                println!(\"Labels: {}\", issue.labels.join(\", \"));\n798\t            }\n799\t        }\n800\t    }\n801\t\n802\t    Ok(())\n803\t}\n804\t\n805\tfn cmd_update(\n806\t    beads_dir: &PathBuf,\n807\t    id: &str,\n808\t    title: Option<String>,\n809\t    status: Option<String>,\n810\t    priority: Option<i32>,\n811\t    assignee: Option<String>,\n812\t) -> Result<()> {\n813\t    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n814\t    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n815\t    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n816\t\n817\t    let changes = IssueChanges {\n818\t        title,\n819\t        status: status.map(|s| Status::from_str(&s).ok()).flatten(),\n820\t        priority,\n821\t        assignee,\n822\t        ..Default::default()\n823\t    };\n824\t\n825\t    storage.update_issue(id, &changes)?;\n826\t    println!(\"Updated bead {}\", id);\n827\t    Ok(())\n828\t}\n829\t\n830\tfn cmd_close(beads_dir: &PathBuf, id: &str, reason: &str) -> Result<()> {\n831\t    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n832\t    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n833\t    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n834\t\n835\t    storage.close_issue(id, reason, \"cli\")?;\n836\t    println!(\"Closed bead {}\", id);\n837\t    Ok(())\n838\t}\n839\t\n840\tfn cmd_reopen(beads_dir: &PathBuf, id: &str) -> Result<()> {\n841\t    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n842\t    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n843\t    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n844\t\n845\t    let changes = IssueChanges {\n846\t        status: Some(Status::Open),\n847\t        ..Default::default()\n848\t    };\n849\t\n850\t    storage.update_issue(id, &changes)?;\n851\t    println!(\"Reopened bead {}\", id);\n852\t    Ok(())\n853\t}\n854\t\n855\tfn cmd_delete(beads_dir: &PathBuf, id: &str) -> Result<()> {\n856\t    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n857\t    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n858\t    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n859\t\n860\t    storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n861\t        tx.execute(\"DELETE FROM issues WHERE id = ?\", [&id])?;\n862\t        Ok(())\n863\t    })?;\n864\t\n865\t    println!(\"Deleted bead {}\", id);\n866\t    Ok(())\n867\t}\n868\t\n869\tfn cmd_ready(beads_dir: &PathBuf, limit: usize, format: &str) -> Result<()> {\n870\t    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n871\t    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n872\t    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n873\t\n874\t    let candidates = storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n875\t        get_ready_candidates(tx, limit)\n876\t    })?;\n877\t\n878\t    match format {\n879\t        \"json\" => {\n880\t            for candidate in candidates {\n881\t                println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string(&candidate)?);\n882\t            }\n883\t        }\n884\t        \"toon\" => {\n885\t            for candidate in candidates {\n886\t                println!(\"{}\", crate::format::toon::format_ready_bead(\n887\t                    &candidate.id,\n888\t                    &candidate.title,\n889\t                    candidate.priority,\n890\t                    candidate.downstream_impact,\n891\t                    candidate.critical_float,\n892\t                ));\n893\t            }\n894\t        }\n895\t        _ => {\n896\t            for candidate in candidates {\n897\t                println!(\"[{}] {} (priority={}, impact={}, float={})\",\n898\t                    candidate.id, candidate.title, candidate.priority,\n899\t                    candidate.downstream_impact, candidate.critical_float);\n900\t            }\n901\t        }\n902\t    }\n903\t\n904\t    Ok(())\n905\t}\n906\t\n907\tfn cmd_claim(\n908\t    beads_dir: &PathBuf,\n909\t    assignee: &str,\n910\t    model: Option<String>,\n911\t    harness: Option<String>,\n912\t    harness_version: Option<String>,\n913\t    any: bool,\n914\t    fallback: bool,\n915\t    workspace_paths: &[PathBuf],\n916\t    dry_run: bool,\n917\t    format: &str,\n918\t) -> Result<()> {\n919\t    let config = load_config(beads_dir)?;\n920\t    let claim_ttl = config.claim_ttl_minutes;\n921\t\n922\t    // Build worker metadata\n923\t    let worker_metadata = WorkerMetadata {\n924\t        worker_id: assignee.to_string(),\n925\t        model: model.clone(),\n926\t        harness: harness.clone(),\n927\t        harness_version: harness_version.clone(),\n928\t    };\n929\t\n930\t    if dry_run {\n931\t        // Dry run mode - show what would be claimed\n932\t        let candidates: Vec<(PathBuf, crate::claim::ScoredBead)> = if any || fallback {\n933\t            // Multi-workspace dry run\n934\t            let paths = if workspace_paths.is_empty() {\n935\t                // Auto-discover workspaces from current directory\n936\t                find_workspaces(&std::env::current_dir()?)?\n937\t            } else {\n938\t                workspace_paths.to_vec()\n939\t            };\n940\t\n941\t            let mut all_candidates = Vec::new();\n942\t            for path in &paths {\n943\t                let local_beads_dir = path.join(\".beads\");\n944\t                if local_beads_dir.exists() {\n945\t                    let local_metadata = match load_metadata(&local_beads_dir) {\n946\t                        Ok(m) => m,\n947\t                        Err(_) => continue,\n948\t                    };\n949\t                    let local_db_path = local_beads_dir.join(&local_metadata.database);\n950\t                    if let Ok(local_storage) = Storage::open(&local_db_path) {\n951\t                        if let Ok(local_candidates) = local_storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n952\t                            get_ready_candidates(tx, 1)\n953\t                        }) {\n954\t                            for c in local_candidates {\n955\t                                all_candidates.push((path.clone(), c));\n956\t                            }\n957\t                        }\n958\t                    }\n959\t                }\n960\t            }\n961\t\n962\t            // Sort by score and take top 1\n963\t            all_candidates.sort_by(|a, b| {\n964\t                let score_a = (b.1.downstream_impact, b.1.priority, b.1.created_at.clone());\n965\t                let score_b = (a.1.downstream_impact, a.1.priority, a.1.created_at.clone());\n966\t                score_a.cmp(&score_b)\n967\t            });\n968\t            all_candidates.into_iter().take(1).collect()\n969\t        } else {\n970\t            // Single workspace dry run\n971\t            let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n972\t            let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n973\t            let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n974\t            let candidates = storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n975\t                get_ready_candidates(tx, 1)\n976\t            })?;\n977\t            candidates.into_iter().map(|c| (beads_dir.parent().unwrap_or(beads_dir).to_path_buf(), c)).collect()\n978\t        };\n979\t\n980\t        if let Some((path, candidate)) = candidates.first() {\n981\t            match format {\n982\t                \"json\" => {\n983\t                    let output = serde_json::json!({\n984\t                        \"bead_id\": candidate.id,\n985\t                        \"title\": candidate.title,\n986\t                        \"priority\": candidate.priority,\n987\t                        \"downstream_impact\": candidate.downstream_impact,\n988\t                        \"assignee\": assignee,\n989\t                        \"workspace\": path.display().to_string(),\n990\t                        \"dry_run\": true\n991\t                    });\n992\t                    println!(\"{}\", output);\n993\t                }\n994\t                _ => {\n995\t                    println!(\"{} (priority={}, impact={}, workspace={})\",\n996\t                        candidate.id, candidate.priority, candidate.downstream_impact, path.display());\n997\t                }\n998\t            }\n999\t        } else if format == \"json\" {\n1000\t            println!(\"{{}}\");\n1001\t        } else {\n1002\t            println!(\"No beads available to claim\");\n1003\t        }\n1004\t    } else if any {\n1005\t        // Claim from any workspace\n1006\t        let paths = if workspace_paths.is_empty() {\n1007\t            // Auto-discover workspaces from current directory\n1008\t            find_workspaces(&std::env::current_dir()?)?\n1009\t        } else {\n1010\t            workspace_paths.to_vec()\n1011\t        };\n1012\t\n1013\t        let result = claim_any(&paths, assignee, claim_ttl, Some(&worker_metadata))?;\n1014\t\n1015\t        match result {\n1016\t            Some(ClaimResult { bead_id, reclaimed, workspace_path }) => {\n1017\t                match format {\n1018\t                    \"json\" => {\n1019\t                        let output = serde_json::json!({\n1020\t                            \"bead_id\": bead_id,\n1021\t                            \"reclaimed\": reclaimed,\n1022\t                            \"assignee\": assignee,\n1023\t                            \"workspace\": workspace_path.map(|p| p.display().to_string())\n1024\t                        });\n1025\t                        println!(\"{}\", output);\n1026\t                    }\n1027\t                    _ => {\n1028\t                        if let Some(path) = workspace_path {\n1029\t                            println!(\"{} (workspace: {})\", bead_id, path.display());\n1030\t                        } else {\n1031\t                            println!(\"{}\", bead_id);\n1032\t                        }\n1033\t                    }\n1034\t                }\n1035\t            }\n1036\t            None => {\n1037\t                if format == \"json\" {\n1038\t                    println!(\"{{}}\");\n1039\t                } else {\n1040\t                    println!(\"No beads available to claim\");\n1041\t                }\n1042\t            }\n1043\t        }\n1044\t    } else if fallback {\n1045\t        // Fallback mode: try current workspace first, then any\n1046\t        let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n1047\t        let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n1048\t        let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n1049\t\n1050\t        let result = storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n1051\t            claim(tx, assignee, claim_ttl, Utc::now(), Some(&worker_metadata))\n1052\t        })?;\n1053\t\n1054\t        match result {\n1055\t            Some(ClaimResult { bead_id, reclaimed, .. }) => {\n1056\t                match format {\n1057\t                    \"json\" => {\n1058\t                        let output = serde_json::json!({\n1059\t                            \"bead_id\": bead_id,\n1060\t                            \"reclaimed\": reclaimed,\n1061\t                            \"assignee\": assignee\n1062\t                        });\n1063\t                        println!(\"{}\", output);\n1064\t                    }\n1065\t                    _ => {\n1066\t                        println!(\"{}\", bead_id);\n1067\t                    }\n1068\t                }\n1069\t            }\n1070\t            None => {\n1071\t                // Fallback to any workspace\n1072\t                let paths = if workspace_paths.is_empty() {\n1073\t                    find_workspaces(&std::env::current_dir()?)?\n1074\t                } else {\n1075\t                    workspace_paths.to_vec()\n1076\t                };\n1077\t\n1078\t                let result = claim_any(&paths, assignee, claim_ttl, Some(&worker_metadata))?;\n1079\t\n1080\t                match result {\n1081\t                    Some(ClaimResult { bead_id, reclaimed, workspace_path }) => {\n1082\t                        match format {\n1083\t                            \"json\" => {\n1084\t                                let output = serde_json::json!({\n1085\t                                    \"bead_id\": bead_id,\n1086\t                                    \"reclaimed\": reclaimed,\n1087\t                                    \"assignee\": assignee,\n1088\t                                    \"workspace\": workspace_path.map(|p| p.display().to_string())\n1089\t                                });\n1090\t                                println!(\"{}\", output);\n1091\t                            }\n1092\t                            _ => {\n1093\t                                if let Some(path) = workspace_path {\n1094\t                                    println!(\"{} (workspace: {})\", bead_id, path.display());\n1095\t                                } else {\n1096\t                                    println!(\"{}\", bead_id);\n1097\t                                }\n1098\t                            }\n1099\t                        }\n1100\t Option<PathBuf>,\n}\n\n#[derive(Subcommand)]\npub enum Commands {\n    /// Create a new bead\n    Create {\n        /// Bead title\n        #[arg(long)]\n        title: String,\n\n        /// Bead type\n        #[arg(long, default_value = \"task\")]\n        type_: String,\n\n        /// Priority (0=Critical, 4=Backlog)\n        #[arg(long, default_value = \"2\")]\n        priority: i32,\n\n        /// Description\n        #[arg(long)]\n        description: Option<String>,\n\n        /// Assignee\n        #[arg(long)]\n        assignee: Option<String>,\n\n        /// Labels\n        #[arg(long)]\n        label: Vec<String>,\n    },\n\n    /// List beads\n    List {\n        /// Filter by status\n        #[arg(long)]\n        status: Option<String>,\n\n        /// Filter by type\n        #[arg(long)]\n        type_: Option<String>,\n\n        /// Filter by assignee\n        #[arg(long)]\n        assignee: Option<String>,\n\n        /// Filter by priority\n        #[arg(long)]\n        priority: Option<i32>,\n\n        /// Limit results (0 = unlimited)\n        #[arg(long)]\n        limit: Option<usize>,\n\n        /// Output format (text, json, toon)\n        #[arg(long, default_value = \"text\")]\n        format: String,\n\n        /// Output JSON (alias for --format json)\n        #[arg(long)]\n        json: bool,\n    },\n\n    /// Show bead details\n    Show {\n        /// Bead ID\n        id: String,\n\n        /// Output format (text, json, toon)\n        #[arg(long, default_value = \"text\")]\n        format: String,\n\n        /// Output JSON (alias for --format json)\n        #[arg(long)]\n        json: bool,\n    },\n\n    /// Update a bead\n    Update {\n        /// Bead ID\n        id: String,\n\n        /// New title\n        #[arg(long)]\n        title: Option<String>,\n\n        /// New status\n        #[arg(long)]\n        status: Option<String>,\n\n        /// New priority\n        #[arg(long)]\n        priority: Option<i32>,\n\n        /// New assignee\n        #[arg(long)]\n        assignee: Option<String>,\n    },\n\n    /// Close a bead\n    Close {\n        /// Bead ID\n        id: String,\n\n        /// Close reason\n        #[arg(long, default_value = \"Completed\")]\n        reason: String,\n    },\n\n    /// Reopen a bead\n    Reopen {\n        /// Bead ID\n        id: String,\n    },\n\n    /// Delete a bead\n    Delete {\n        /// Bead ID\n        id: String,\n    },\n\n    /// Show ready (unblocked) beads\n    Ready {\n        /// Limit results (0 = unlimited)\n        #[arg(long, default_value = \"10\")]\n        limit: usize,\n\n        /// Output format (text, json, toon)\n        #[arg(long, default_value = \"text\")]\n        format: String,\n\n        /// Output JSON (alias for --format json)\n        #[arg(long)]\n        json: bool,\n    },\n\n    /// Claim a bead (atomic)\n    Claim {\n        /// Assignee (worker ID)\n        #[arg(long)]\n        assignee: String,\n\n        /// Model\n        #[arg(long)]\n        model: Option<String>,\n\n        /// Harness\n        #[arg(long)]\n        harness: Option<String>,\n\n        /// Harness version\n        #[arg(long)]\n        harness_version: Option<String>,\n\n        /// Claim from any workspace (searches all .beads/ directories)\n        #[arg(long)]\n        any: bool,\n\n        /// Fallback mode: try current workspace first, fall back to any if no beads available\n        #[arg(long)]\n        fallback: bool,\n\n        /// Workspace paths to search (only used with --any)\n        #[arg(long)]\n        workspace_paths: Vec<PathBuf>,\n\n        /// Dry run (show what would be claimed without claiming)\n        #[arg(long)]\n        dry_run: bool,\n\n        /// Output format (text, json, toon)\n        #[arg(long, default_value = \"text\")]\n        format: String,\n\n        /// Output JSON (alias for --format json)\n        #[arg(long)]\n        json: bool,\n    },\n\n    /// Initialize a new workspace\n    Init {\n        /// Issue prefix\n        #[arg(long, default_value = \"bf\")]\n        prefix: String,\n    },\n\n    /// Sync (flush to JSONL or import from JSONL)\n    Sync {\n        /// Flush only (SQLite -> JSONL)\n        #[arg(long)]\n        flush_only: bool,\n\n        /// Import only (JSONL -> SQLite)\n        #[arg(long)]\n        import_only: bool,\n    },\n\n    /// Doctor - check and repair\n    Doctor {\n        /// Repair database\n        #[arg(long)]\n        repair: bool,\n    },\n\n    /// Count beads\n    Count {\n        /// Filter by status\n        #[arg(long)]\n        status: Option<String>,\n    },\n\n    /// Batch operations (atomic)\n    Batch {\n        /// JSON file containing operations\n        #[arg(long)]\n        file: Option<PathBuf>,\n\n        /// JSON string containing operations\n        #[arg(long)]\n        json: Option<String>,\n\n        /// Read from stdin\n        #[arg(long, default_value = \"false\")]\n        stdin: bool,\n    },\n\n    /// Mitosis: split a bead into children atomically\n    Mitosis {\n        /// Parent bead ID to split\n        id: String,\n\n        /// Child bead definitions (JSON array of {title, type, priority})\n        #[arg(long)]\n        children: String,\n\n        /// Close reason for parent bead\n        #[arg(long, default_value = \"Split into children\")]\n        reason: String,\n\n        /// Output format (text, json, toon)\n        #[arg(long, default_value = \"text\")]\n        format: String,\n    },\n\n    /// Manage dependencies\n    #[command(subcommand)]\n    Dep(DepCommands),\n\n    /// Manage labels\n    #[command(subcommand)]\n    Label(LabelCommands),\n\n    /// List labels for a specific issue (direct SELECT, efficient)\n    Labels {\n        /// Bead ID\n        id: String,\n\n        /// Output format (text, json)\n        #[arg(short, long, default_value = \"text\")]\n        format: String,\n    },\n\n    /// Manage comments\n    #[command(subcommand)]\n    Comments(CommentsCommands),\n\n    /// Search beads\n    Search {\n        /// Search query\n        query: Option<String>,\n\n        /// Filter by status\n        #[arg(short, long)]\n        status: Vec<String>,\n\n        /// Filter by type\n        #[arg(short, long)]\n        type_: Vec<String>,\n\n        /// Filter by assignee\n        #[arg(long)]\n        assignee: Option<String>,\n\n        /// Filter by label\n        #[arg(short, long)]\n        label: Vec<String>,\n\n        /// Filter by minimum priority\n        #[arg(long, value_name = \"MIN\")]\n        priority_min: Option<i32>,\n\n        /// Filter by maximum priority\n        #[arg(long, value_name = \"MAX\")]\n        priority_max: Option<i32>,\n\n        /// Limit results\n        #[arg(long, default_value = \"50\")]\n        limit: usize,\n\n        /// Output format (text, json, toon)\n        #[arg(long, default_value = \"text\")]\n        format: String,\n    },\n\n    /// Show statistics\n    Stats {\n        /// Show breakdown by type\n        #[arg(long)]\n        by_type: bool,\n\n        /// Show breakdown by priority\n        #[arg(long)]\n        by_priority: bool,\n\n        /// Show breakdown by assignee\n        #[arg(long)]\n        by_assignee: bool,\n\n        /// Show breakdown by label\n        #[arg(long)]\n        by_label: bool,\n\n        /// Output format (text, json, toon)\n        #[arg(long, default_value = \"text\")]\n        format: String,\n    },\n\n    /// Emit JSON Schema\n    Schema {\n        /// Schema target\n        #[arg(default_value = \"all\")]\n        target: String,\n\n        /// Output format (text, json)\n        #[arg(long, default_value = \"json\")]\n        format: String,\n    },\n\n    /// Configuration management\n    #[command(subcommand)]\n    Config(ConfigCommands),\n\n    /// Show velocity stats (bead-forge specific)\n    Velocity {\n        /// Model\n        #[arg(long)]\n        model: Option<String>,\n\n        /// Harness\n        #[arg(long)]\n        harness: Option<String>,\n\n        /// Output format (text, json, toon)\n        #[arg(long, default_value = \"text\")]\n        format: String,\n    },\n\n    /// Manage annotations\n    #[command(subcommand)]\n    Annotate(AnnotateCommands),\n\n    /// Show event log for a bead\n    Log {\n        /// Bead ID\n        id: String,\n\n        /// Limit number of entries\n        #[arg(long)]\n        limit: Option<usize>,\n\n        /// Output format (text, json, toon)\n        #[arg(long, default_value = \"text\")]\n        format: String,\n    },\n\n    /// Show critical path (longest chain of blocking dependencies)\n    CriticalPath {\n        /// Root bead ID\n        id: String,\n\n        /// Maximum depth\n        #[arg(long, default_value = \"20\")]\n        max_depth: usize,\n\n        /// Output format (text, json, toon)\n        #[arg(long, default_value = \"text\")]\n        format: String,\n    },\n\n    /// Rotate (archive) closed beads older than threshold\n    Rotate {\n        /// Days threshold (archive beads closed this many days ago)\n        #[arg(long, default_value = \"30\")]\n        days: u64,\n\n        /// Dry run (show what would be rotated)\n        #[arg(long)]\n        dry_run: bool,\n    },\n}\n\n#[derive(Subcommand)]\npub enum DepCommands {\n    /// Add a dependency\n    Add {\n        /// Issue ID (the one that will depend on something)\n        issue: String,\n\n        /// Target issue ID (the one being depended on)\n        depends_on: String,\n\n        /// Dependency type\n        #[arg(short, long, default_value = \"blocks\")]\n        type_: String,\n    },\n\n    /// Remove a dependency\n    Remove {\n        /// Issue ID\n        issue: String,\n\n        /// Target issue ID to remove dependency to\n        depends_on: String,\n    },\n\n    /// List dependencies of an issue\n    List {\n        /// Issue ID\n        id: String,\n    },\n\n    /// Show dependency tree rooted at issue\n    Tree {\n        /// Issue ID (root of tree)\n        id: String,\n\n        /// Tree direction (down, up, both)\n        #[arg(short, long, default_value = \"down\")]\n        direction: String,\n\n        /// Maximum depth\n        #[arg(long, default_value = \"10\")]\n        max_depth: usize,\n    },\n}\n\n#[derive(Subcommand)]\npub enum LabelCommands {\n    /// Add label(s) to an issue\n    Add {\n        /// Issue ID\n        id: String,\n\n        /// Label(s) to add (multiple labels supported)\n        #[arg(short, long, required = true, num_args = 1..)]\n        label: Vec<String>,\n    },\n\n    /// Remove label(s) from an issue\n    Remove {\n        /// Issue ID\n        id: String,\n\n        /// Label(s) to remove (multiple labels supported)\n        #[arg(short, long, required = true, num_args = 1..)]\n        label: Vec<String>,\n    },\n\n    /// List labels for an issue or all unique labels\n    List {\n        /// Issue ID (optional - if omitted, lists all unique labels)\n        id: Option<String>,\n    },\n}\n\n#[derive(Subcommand)]\npub enum CommentsCommands {\n    /// Add a comment\n    Add {\n        /// Issue ID\n        id: String,\n\n        /// Comment text\n        #[arg(required = true, num_args = 1..)]\n        text: Vec<String>,\n    },\n\n    /// List comments for an issue\n    List {\n        /// Issue ID\n        id: String,\n    },\n}\n\n#[derive(Subcommand)]\npub enum ConfigCommands {\n    /// List all config values\n    List,\n\n    /// Get a specific config value\n    Get {\n        /// Config key\n        key: String,\n    },\n\n    /// Show config file path\n    Path,\n}\n\n#[derive(Subcommand)]\npub enum AnnotateCommands {\n    /// Set an annotation\n    Set {\n        /// Issue ID\n        id: String,\n\n        /// Annotation key\n        key: String,\n\n        /// Annotation value\n        value: String,\n    },\n\n    /// Get an annotation\n    Get {\n        /// Issue ID\n        id: String,\n\n        /// Annotation key\n        key: String,\n    },\n\n    /// Remove an annotation\n    Remove {\n        /// Issue ID\n        id: String,\n\n        /// Annotation key\n        key: String,\n    },\n\n    /// List all annotations for an issue\n    List {\n        /// Issue ID\n        id: String,\n    },\n\n    /// Clear all annotations for an issue\n    Clear {\n        /// Issue ID\n        id: String,\n    },\n}\n\npub fn run_cli() -> Result<Cli> {\n    Ok(Cli::try_parse()?)\n}\n\npub fn run(cli: Cli) -> Result<()> {\n    let workspace = cli.workspace.unwrap_or_else(|| PathBuf::from(\".\"));\n\n    // For init command, we allow the .beads directory to not exist yet\n    match &cli.command {\n        Commands::Init { .. } => {\n            let beads_dir = workspace.join(\".beads\");\n            return match cli.command {\n                Commands::Init { prefix } => cmd_init(&beads_dir, &prefix),\n                _ => unreachable!(),\n            };\n        }\n        _ => {}\n    }\n\n    let beads_dir = find_beads_dir(&workspace)\n        .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!(\"No .beads directory found in {:?}\", workspace))?;\n\n    match cli.command {\n        Commands::Init { prefix } => cmd_init(&beads_dir, &prefix),\n        Commands::Create { title, type_, priority, description, assignee, label } => {\n            cmd_create(&beads_dir, title, type_, priority, description, assignee, label)\n        }\n        Commands::List { status, type_, assignee, priority, limit, format, json } => {\n            let format = if json { \"json\".to_string() } else { format };\n            cmd_list(&beads_dir, status, type_, assignee, priority, limit, &format)\n        }\n        Commands::Show { id, format, json } => {\n            let format = if json { \"json\".to_string() } else { format };\n            cmd_show(&beads_dir, &id, &format)\n        }\n        Commands::Update { id, title, status, priority, assignee } => {\n            cmd_update(&beads_dir, &id, title, status, priority, assignee)\n        }\n        Commands::Close { id, reason } => cmd_close(&beads_dir, &id, &reason),\n        Commands::Reopen { id } => cmd_reopen(&beads_dir, &id),\n        Commands::Delete { id } => cmd_delete(&beads_dir, &id),\n        Commands::Ready { limit, format, json } => {\n            let format = if json { \"json\".to_string() } else { format };\n            cmd_ready(&beads_dir, limit, &format)\n        }\n        Commands::Claim { assignee, model, harness, harness_version, any, fallback, workspace_paths, dry_run, format, json } => {\n            let format = if json { \"json\".to_string() } else { format };\n            cmd_claim(&beads_dir, &assignee, model, harness, harness_version, any, fallback, &workspace_paths, dry_run, &format)\n        }\n        Commands::Sync { flush_only, import_only } => cmd_sync(&beads_dir, flush_only, import_only),\n        Commands::Doctor { repair } => cmd_doctor(&beads_dir, repair),\n        Commands::Count { status } => cmd_count(&beads_dir, status),\n        Commands::Batch { file, json, stdin } => cmd_batch(&beads_dir, file, json, stdin),\n        Commands::Mitosis { id, children, reason, format } => cmd_mitosis(&beads_dir, &id, &children, &reason, &format),\n        Commands::Dep(dep) => cmd_dep(&beads_dir, dep),\n        Commands::Label(label) => cmd_label(&beads_dir, label),\n        Commands::Comments(comments) => cmd_comments(&beads_dir, comments),\n        Commands::Search { query, status, type_, assignee, label, priority_min, priority_max, limit, format } => {\n            cmd_search(&beads_dir, query, status, type_, assignee, label, priority_min, priority_max, limit, &format)\n        }\n        Commands::Stats { by_type, by_priority, by_assignee, by_label, format } => {\n            cmd_stats(&beads_dir, by_type, by_priority, by_assignee, by_label, &format)\n        }\n        Commands::Schema { target, format } => cmd_schema(&target, &format),\n        Commands::Config(config) => cmd_config(&beads_dir, config),\n        Commands::Velocity { model, harness, format } => cmd_velocity(&beads_dir, model, harness, &format),\n        Commands::Labels { id, format } => cmd_labels(&beads_dir, &id, &format),\n        Commands::Annotate(annotate) => cmd_annotate(&beads_dir, annotate),\n        Commands::Log { id, limit, format } => cmd_log(&beads_dir, &id, limit, &format),\n        Commands::CriticalPath { id, max_depth, format } => cmd_critical_path(&beads_dir, &id, max_depth, &format),\n        Commands::Rotate { days, dry_run } => cmd_rotate(&beads_dir, days, dry_run),\n    }\n}\n\nfn cmd_init(beads_dir: &PathBuf, prefix: &str) -> Result<()> {\n    std::fs::create_dir_all(beads_dir)?;\n\n    let config_path = beads_dir.join(\"config.yaml\");\n    if !config_path.exists() {\n        let config = format!(\n            r#\"issue_prefixes: [{}]\ndefault_priority: 2\ndefault_type: task\nclaim_ttl_minutes: 30\n\"#,\n            prefix\n        );\n        std::fs::write(&config_path, config)?;\n    }\n\n    let metadata_path = beads_dir.join(\"metadata.json\");\n    if !metadata_path.exists() {\n        let metadata = r#\"{\"database\": \"beads.db\", \"jsonl_export\": \"issues.jsonl\"}\"#;\n        std::fs::write(&metadata_path, metadata)?;\n    }\n\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(\"beads.db\");\n    let _storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let gitignore_path = beads_dir.join(\".gitignore\");\n    if !gitignore_path.exists() {\n        std::fs::write(&gitignore_path, \"beads.db\\nbeads.db-shm\\nbeads.db-wal\\n\")?;\n    }\n\n    println!(\"Initialized bead-forge workspace in {:?}\", beads_dir);\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_create(\n    beads_dir: &PathBuf,\n    title: String,\n    type_: String,\n    priority: i32,\n    description: Option<String>,\n    assignee: Option<String>,\n    labels: Vec<String>,\n) -> Result<()> {\n    let config = load_config(beads_dir)?;\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let count = storage.count_issues()?;\n    let prefix = get_default_prefix(&config);\n    let id = crate::id::generate_id(prefix, count);\n\n    let mut issue = Issue::new(id.clone(), title, \".\".to_string());\n    issue.issue_type = IssueType::from_str(type_.as_str()).map_err(|e| anyhow::anyhow!(e))?;\n    issue.priority = Priority(priority);\n    issue.description = description;\n    issue.assignee = assignee;\n    issue.labels = labels;\n\n    storage.create_issue(&issue)?;\n\n    println!(\"{}\", id);\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_list(\n    beads_dir: &PathBuf,\n    status: Option<String>,\n    type_: Option<String>,\n    assignee: Option<String>,\n    priority: Option<i32>,\n    limit: Option<usize>,\n    format: &str,\n) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let mut filter = IssueFilter::default();\n    if let Some(s) = status {\n        filter.status = Some(Status::from_str(s.as_str()).map_err(|e| anyhow::anyhow!(e))?);\n    }\n    if let Some(t) = type_ {\n        filter.issue_type = Some(IssueType::from_str(t.as_str()).map_err(|e| anyhow::anyhow!(e))?);\n    }\n    filter.assignee = assignee;\n    filter.priority = priority;\n    // --limit 0 means unlimited\n    filter.limit = limit.and_then(|l| if l == 0 { None } else { Some(l) });\n\n    let issues = storage.list_issues(&filter)?;\n\n    let output_format = OutputFormat::from_str(format).unwrap_or(OutputFormat::Text);\n    let formatter = get_formatter(output_format);\n    print!(\"{}\", formatter.format_issues(&issues));\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_show(beads_dir: &PathBuf, id: &str, format: &str) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let issue = storage.get_issue(id)?.ok_or_else(|| anyhow!(\"Bead not found: {}\", id))?;\n\n    match format {\n        \"json\" => {\n            // Strip dependencies/comments before serializing: NEEDLE's BrDependency\n            // format ({id, title, status, priority, dependency_type}) differs from\n            // bead-forge's Dependency format ({issue_id, depends_on_id, type, ...}).\n            // NEEDLE has #[serde(default)] on the deps field so empty is fine.\n            let mut out = issue;\n            out.dependencies = vec![];\n            out.comments = vec![];\n            // Wrap in array so NEEDLE's parse_single_bead (Vec<Bead> → first) works.\n            println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string(&vec![out])?);\n        }\n        \"toon\" => {\n            println!(\"ID: {}\", issue.id);\n            println!(\"Title: {}\", issue.title);\n            println!(\"Status: {}\", issue.status);\n            println!(\"Priority: {}\", issue.priority);\n            println!(\"Type: {}\", issue.issue_type);\n            if let Some(desc) = &issue.description {\n                println!(\"Description: {}\", desc);\n            }\n            if let Some(assignee) = &issue.assignee {\n                println!(\"Assignee: {}\", assignee);\n            }\n            if !issue.labels.is_empty() {\n                println!(\"Labels: {}\", issue.labels.join(\", \"));\n            }\n        }\n        _ => {\n            println!(\"ID: {}\", issue.id);\n            println!(\"Title: {}\", issue.title);\n            println!(\"Status: {}\", issue.status);\n            println!(\"Priority: {}\", issue.priority);\n            println!(\"Type: {}\", issue.issue_type);\n            if let Some(desc) = &issue.description {\n                println!(\"Description: {}\", desc);\n            }\n            if let Some(assignee) = &issue.assignee {\n                println!(\"Assignee: {}\", assignee);\n            }\n            if !issue.labels.is_empty() {\n                println!(\"Labels: {}\", issue.labels.join(\", \"));\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_update(\n    beads_dir: &PathBuf,\n    id: &str,\n    title: Option<String>,\n    status: Option<String>,\n    priority: Option<i32>,\n    assignee: Option<String>,\n) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let changes = IssueChanges {\n        title,\n        status: status.map(|s| Status::from_str(&s).ok()).flatten(),\n        priority,\n        assignee,\n        ..Default::default()\n    };\n\n    storage.update_issue(id, &changes)?;\n    println!(\"Updated bead {}\", id);\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_close(beads_dir: &PathBuf, id: &str, reason: &str) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    storage.close_issue(id, reason, \"cli\")?;\n    println!(\"Closed bead {}\", id);\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_reopen(beads_dir: &PathBuf, id: &str) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let changes = IssueChanges {\n        status: Some(Status::Open),\n        ..Default::default()\n    };\n\n    storage.update_issue(id, &changes)?;\n    println!(\"Reopened bead {}\", id);\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_delete(beads_dir: &PathBuf, id: &str) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n        tx.execute(\"DELETE FROM issues WHERE id = ?\", [&id])?;\n        Ok(())\n    })?;\n\n    println!(\"Deleted bead {}\", id);\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_ready(beads_dir: &PathBuf, limit: usize, format: &str) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let candidates = storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n        get_ready_candidates(tx, limit)\n    })?;\n\n    match format {\n        \"json\" => {\n            for candidate in candidates {\n                println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string(&candidate)?);\n            }\n        }\n        \"toon\" => {\n            for candidate in candidates {\n                println!(\"{}\", crate::format::toon::format_ready_bead(\n                    &candidate.id,\n                    &candidate.title,\n                    candidate.priority,\n                    candidate.downstream_impact,\n                    candidate.critical_float,\n                ));\n            }\n        }\n        _ => {\n            for candidate in candidates {\n                println!(\"[{}] {} (priority={}, impact={}, float={})\",\n                    candidate.id, candidate.title, candidate.priority,\n                    candidate.downstream_impact, candidate.critical_float);\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_claim(\n    beads_dir: &PathBuf,\n    assignee: &str,\n    model: Option<String>,\n    harness: Option<String>,\n    harness_version: Option<String>,\n    any: bool,\n    fallback: bool,\n    workspace_paths: &[PathBuf],\n    dry_run: bool,\n    format: &str,\n) -> Result<()> {\n    let config = load_config(beads_dir)?;\n    let claim_ttl = config.claim_ttl_minutes;\n\n    // Build worker metadata\n    let worker_metadata = WorkerMetadata {\n        worker_id: assignee.to_string(),\n        model: model.clone(),\n        harness: harness.clone(),\n        harness_version: harness_version.clone(),\n    };\n\n    if dry_run {\n        // Dry run mode - show what would be claimed\n        let candidates: Vec<(PathBuf, crate::claim::ScoredBead)> = if any || fallback {\n            // Multi-workspace dry run\n            let paths = if workspace_paths.is_empty() {\n                // Auto-discover workspaces from current directory\n                find_workspaces(&std::env::current_dir()?)?\n            } else {\n                workspace_paths.to_vec()\n            };\n\n            let mut all_candidates = Vec::new();\n            for path in &paths {\n                let local_beads_dir = path.join(\".beads\");\n                if local_beads_dir.exists() {\n                    let local_metadata = match load_metadata(&local_beads_dir) {\n                        Ok(m) => m,\n                        Err(_) => continue,\n                    };\n                    let local_db_path = local_beads_dir.join(&local_metadata.database);\n                    if let Ok(local_storage) = Storage::open(&local_db_path) {\n                        if let Ok(local_candidates) = local_storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n                            get_ready_candidates(tx, 1)\n                        }) {\n                            for c in local_candidates {\n                                all_candidates.push((path.clone(), c));\n                            }\n                        }\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n\n            // Sort by score and take top 1\n            all_candidates.sort_by(|a, b| {\n                let score_a = (b.1.downstream_impact, b.1.priority, b.1.created_at.clone());\n                let score_b = (a.1.downstream_impact, a.1.priority, a.1.created_at.clone());\n                score_a.cmp(&score_b)\n            });\n            all_candidates.into_iter().take(1).collect()\n        } else {\n            // Single workspace dry run\n            let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n            let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n            let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n            let candidates = storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n                get_ready_candidates(tx, 1)\n            })?;\n            candidates.into_iter().map(|c| (beads_dir.parent().unwrap_or(beads_dir).to_path_buf(), c)).collect()\n        };\n\n        if let Some((path, candidate)) = candidates.first() {\n            match format {\n                \"json\" => {\n                    let output = serde_json::json!({\n                        \"bead_id\": candidate.id,\n                        \"title\": candidate.title,\n                        \"priority\": candidate.priority,\n                        \"downstream_impact\": candidate.downstream_impact,\n                        \"assignee\": assignee,\n                        \"workspace\": path.display().to_string(),\n                        \"dry_run\": true\n                    });\n                    println!(\"{}\", output);\n                }\n                _ => {\n                    println!(\"{} (priority={}, impact={}, workspace={})\",\n                        candidate.id, candidate.priority, candidate.downstream_impact, path.display());\n                }\n            }\n        } else if format == \"json\" {\n            println!(\"{{}}\");\n        } else {\n            println!(\"No beads available to claim\");\n        }\n    } else if any {\n        // Claim from any workspace\n        let paths = if workspace_paths.is_empty() {\n            // Auto-discover workspaces from current directory\n            find_workspaces(&std::env::current_dir()?)?\n        } else {\n            workspace_paths.to_vec()\n        };\n\n        let result = claim_any(&paths, assignee, claim_ttl, Some(&worker_metadata))?;\n\n        match result {\n            Some(ClaimResult { bead_id, reclaimed, workspace_path }) => {\n                match format {\n                    \"json\" => {\n                        let output = serde_json::json!({\n                            \"bead_id\": bead_id,\n                            \"reclaimed\": reclaimed,\n                            \"assignee\": assignee,\n                            \"workspace\": workspace_path.map(|p| p.display().to_string())\n                        });\n                        println!(\"{}\", output);\n                    }\n                    _ => {\n                        if let Some(path) = workspace_path {\n                            println!(\"{} (workspace: {})\", bead_id, path.display());\n                        } else {\n                            println!(\"{}\", bead_id);\n                        }\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n            None => {\n                if format == \"json\" {\n                    println!(\"{{}}\");\n                } else {\n                    println!(\"No beads available to claim\");\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    } else if fallback {\n        // Fallback mode: try current workspace first, then any\n        let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n        let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n        let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n        let result = storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n            claim(tx, assignee, claim_ttl, Utc::now(), Some(&worker_metadata))\n        })?;\n\n        match result {\n            Some(ClaimResult { bead_id, reclaimed, .. }) => {\n                match format {\n                    \"json\" => {\n                        let output = serde_json::json!({\n                            \"bead_id\": bead_id,\n                            \"reclaimed\": reclaimed,\n                            \"assignee\": assignee\n                        });\n                        println!(\"{}\", output);\n                    }\n                    _ => {\n                        println!(\"{}\", bead_id);\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n            None => {\n                // Fallback to any workspace\n                let paths = if workspace_paths.is_empty() {\n                    find_workspaces(&std::env::current_dir()?)?\n                } else {\n                    workspace_paths.to_vec()\n                };\n\n                let result = claim_any(&paths, assignee, claim_ttl, Some(&worker_metadata))?;\n\n                match result {\n                    Some(ClaimResult { bead_id, reclaimed, workspace_path }) => {\n                        match format {\n                            \"json\" => {\n                                let output = serde_json::json!({\n                                    \"bead_id\": bead_id,\n                                    \"reclaimed\": reclaimed,\n                                    \"assignee\": assignee,\n                                    \"workspace\": workspace_path.map(|p| p.display().to_string())\n                                });\n                                println!(\"{}\", output);\n                            }\n                            _ => {\n                                if let Some(path) = workspace_path {\n                                    println!(\"{} (workspace: {})\", bead_id, path.display());\n                                } else {\n                                    println!(\"{}\", bead_id);\n                                }\n                            }\n                        }\n                    }\n                    None => {\n                        if format == \"json\" {\n                            println!(\"{{}}\");\n                        } else {\n                            println!(\"No beads available to claim\");\n                        }\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    } else {\n        // Normal single-workspace claim\n        let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n        let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n        let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n        let result = storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n            claim(tx, assignee, claim_ttl, bead_id);\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n            None => {\n                if format == \"json\" {\n                    println!(\"{{}}\");\n                } else {\n                    println!(\"No beads available to claim\");\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_sync(beads_dir: &PathBuf, flush_only: bool, import_only:    };\n\n    println!(\"{}\", count);\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_batch(beads_dir: &PathBuf, file: Option<PathBuf>, json: Option<String>, stdin: bool) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let ops: Vec<BatchOp> = if let Some(json_str) = json {\n        serde_json::from_str(&json_str)?\n    } else if let Some(file_path) = file {\n        let content = std::fs::read_to_string(&file_path)?;\n        serde_json::from_str(&content)?\n    } else if stdin {\n        parse_stdin()?\n    } else {\n        return Err(anyhow!(\"Must provide --file, --json, or --stdin\"));\n    };\n\n    let results = execute_batch(&storage, ops, beads_dir)?;\n\n    // else {\n                println!(\"[op {}] ok\", result.op);\n            }\n        } else {\n            eprintln!(\"[op {}] error: {}\", result.op, result.error.unwrap_or_default());\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_mitosis(beads_dir: &PathBuf, id: &str, children: &str, reason: &str, format: &str) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path =
